description:
JERA Global Markets (JERAGM) is a leading utility-backed energy trader specialising in LNG, power, coal and freight. A joint venture between majority shareholder JERA Co., Inc. and EDF Trading, JERAGM’s shareholders are among the world’s major utilities. 

JERAGM operates one of the most exciting energy portfolios in the world which gives it an in-depth understanding of the way local, regional and international energy markets behave. These insights enable it to help its customers increase security of supply, optimise their portfolios and improve the risk management of their assets.

Headquartered in Singapore, JERAGM has a global talent pool of about 400 people across offices located in five strategic locations: Singapore, the UK (London), Japan (Tokyo), the US (Houston) and Australia (Brisbane). 

JERAGM is strongly capitalised with over US$500 million in paid up capital and a total equity of US$4 billion. JERAGM has been affirmed an AA- Stable credit rating from R&I (upgraded from A+ Stable in October 2024), attributable to a robust business model and solid financial base.

description:
Powered by the vision of connecting businesses worldwide to transact with ease, Henatenn is an Integrated Omni-channel Commerce and Supply Chain Solutions Enabler that Harnesses Evolving Technological Innovations. 
 
The group comprises three distinct affiliates that offer a comprehensive range of solutions for the beauty and fragrances industry to include:
 
NEFERTI – Channel Distribution Partner
NOVELA – Premium Retailer
DTB – Market Expansion Solutioning 

Customer-centricity and Warmth are deeply ingrained in the Henatenn DNA.  Relationships with partners and customers are highly valued, with many lasting over a decade – one of the key reasons why the company has enjoyed sustainable growth through the years.
 
Internally, it translates to being an equal opportunity and nurturing organisation. Henatenn invests in its employees, giving them room to be creative, grow and excel, which has resulted in a high-performance team that stands united and collaborative. Everyone is empowered to overcome challenges and celebrating success together has become a part of its culture.
 
Henatenn has in less than ten years, grown from 2 people to over 150 employees. In 2019, the company acquired its building to increase efficiencies in both B2B and B2C E-commerce.
 
With an established unique supply chain and distribution system that solidified over the years through continual innovation and customer interaction, the group has seen revenues exceed SGD 100 million annually. 

In the last decade, the group has successfully planted its footprint outside its Singapore headquarters, Henatenn is on-track to achieving its dream of global omni-presence.

description:
Exim & Mfr Enterprise established in 1982 in Singapore, has been a leading provider of high-quality electro-mechanical components, fasteners, sleevings/tubings, wires, and wiring management solutions to industries and manufacturers worldwide.

Our customers include multinational industry household names who rely on us for our commitment to quality, adherence to stringent supplier qualification standards and achieving sustainability initiatives.

     •  Headquartered in Singapore, supported by sales and branch offices in
        India, Indonesia, Malaysia, Philippines, Thailand, and Vietnam.
     •  An extensive product portfolio comprising over 40,000-line items across
        155 commodity groups sourced from reputable manufacturers 
        worldwide.
     •  Our Singapore facility is equipped with state-of-the-art quality control
        equipment, ensuring that every product meets our customer’s exacting
        requirements.
     •  Value-added services like nylon patching, tube cutting and markings, and
        customized kitting and sub-assemblies are available to meet specific
        customer requirements.
     •  We offer integrated supply chain solutions including Vendor Managed
        Inventory (VMI), to streamline operations, enhance efficiency, and cost
        productivity.
     •  DNV and TÜV Registered certifications: AS 9120, IATF 16949, ISO 9001,
        ISO 13485, ISO 14001, ISO 22301, ISO 26000, ISO 27001, ISO 28000, 
        ISO 29001, ISO 37001, ISO 45001, and ISO 50001.

For inquiries or further information, please reach out to us at sales@eximfr.com.sg.

description:
We are a leading global Wholesale Distribution business established in 1982 and headquartered in Singapore. Tionale, derived from the word “Interna-Tionale” started with one clear vision – build a truly international company. With physical presence in our major markets and automated warehouses in strategic locations, we manage a diversified product portfolio to serve our customers in over 80 countries. Our customers include wholesalers, retail chains, internet retailers, manufacturers and distributors depending on the product category.

 
We provide value to our customers by giving them access to our diversified product portfolio sourced from the most reliable and competitive suppliers globally. Our specialized teams work with our customers and provide technical / commercial inputs, industry trends etc. to aid their decision making. We speak their language – amongst others French in Francophone Africa, Spanish in South America or Mandarin in China which gives us the ability to go deeper in the markets. Our global customer base is spread over developed markets in America, Asia, Europe & Middle East to remote markets in Africa. Our dedicated team takes pride in being close to the customer, unlocking growth opportunities for the business.


We believe in long term partnerships and commitments with our suppliers. Over the years, we have been their partners in their journey to gain insights into the various markets and distribute their products in niche markets. Many of these suppliers have grown with us over the last decade and more, as we provide them the volumes and access to multiple markets while taking over the risks. We carry a wide range of stocks in some of our product categories and deliver in assortments to our customers.

company_name: HoST Pte Ltd ( A Sonepar Company )
description:
About HoST
HoST is a trailblazer in industrial automation and smart manufacturing solutions, serving both local and regional markets across Southeast Asia. Renowned as the exclusive authorised distributor of Allen-Bradley in Singapore, HoST has become synonymous with reliability, innovation, and excellence in automation technologies.
Driven by a vision to deliver customer-centric value in an ever-evolving industrial landscape, HoST is recognised for forging strong, enduring partnerships while consistently expanding its ecosystem to offer best-in-class, future-ready solutions

As a trusted leader in the industry, HoST continues to set new standards, empowering businesses to stay ahead in a competitive and connected world. Learn more at www.host.sg

HoST is part of the Sonepar Group

Sonepar is an independent family-owned company standing as the world leader in B-to-B distribution of electrical equipment, solutions, and services. In 2024, Sonepar achieved sales of €32.5 billion. Present in 40 countries with a dense network of brands, the Group is leading an ambitious transformation to make its customers’ lives easier providing them with an omnichannel experience and sustainable solutions in the building, industry, and energy markets. Sonepar’s 46 000 associates are committed to accelerating the world’s electrification and driven by a shared Purpose: Powering Progress for Future Generations. www.sonepar.com

description:
NEFERTI was inspired by the ancient Egyptian Queen Nefertiti, whose beauty was legendary and with the archaeological discovery of her head bust, remains the world’s most recognisable icon of beauty.  

An affiliate of Henatenn Holdings, NEFERTI was established in 2010 and provided omni-channel supply chain management solutions for beauty and lifestyle products. Supported by over 70 diverse talents in the Singapore headquarters, it manages a comprehensive portfolio across multiple categories: skincare, personal care, fragrances, cosmetics, household and beverages.

NEFERTI offers its experience in distribution logistics and product management, an established and robust global network, and local capabilities to navigate seamlessly in the respective countries. In tandem with its business volume, its reputation amongst industry players has also grown exponentially, making it one of the preferred partners of many brands. Presently, NEFERTI connects with customers spanning China, Taiwan, Hong Kong, Japan, Dubai (UAE), Thailand, Australia, USA, Indonesia, Cambodia, Vietnam, Myanmar and Malaysia.

Its transformation to be a leading omni-channel supply chain solution provider has resulted in multiple e-commerce platforms selecting NEFERTI to power its beauty product and fragrance offering as the backend enabler, from sourcing, inventory management, forecasting, delivery as well as marketing. 

Its move to its warehousing facilities has enabled NEFERTI to incorporate digital tools to manage and control information, finance and flow of goods. It has allowed innovative solutions for its customers, as it continues to offer value and competitive ness to meet the needs of the markets and the network.

We have customers from the F&B, hospitality and catering industries as well. 
 
Whether you are a home-user, or the F&B and corporate industry, it's our mission to provide you with products and services beyond your satisfaction.

description:
About Sonepar
Sonepar is an independent family-owned company standing as the world leader in B-to-B distribution of electrical equipment, solutions, and services. In 2024, Sonepar achieved sales of €32.5 billion. Present in 40 countries with a dense network of brands, the Group is leading an ambitious transformation to make its customers’ lives easier providing them with an omnichannel experience and sustainable solutions in the building, industry, and energy markets. Sonepar’s 46 000 associates are committed to accelerating the world’s electrification and driven by a shared Purpose: Powering Progress for Future Generations. www.sonepar.com

Sonepar in Singapore 
Sonepar Singapore is a leading B2B distributor of electrical products, automation solutions, and services. It is part of the global Sonepar Group, which operates in 40 countries. Sonepar Singapore focuses on  four key market segments: Engineering Solutions, Commercial Electrical, Project Lighting and Industrial Automation. Through these divisions, the company delivers reliable, innovative, and sustainable solutions to meet the evolving needs of the industry. www.sonepar.com.sg

description:
Having identified the need for even more niche and luxury beauty brands trying to gain a foothold in Asia, DTB, the brand acquisition and distribution affiliate of Henatenn Holdings was established in 2017.  
 
DTB aims to build brands that inspire, and from its creation, unleashed its wealth of knowledge of the industry to secure exclusive rights for highly sought-after premium brands like Filorga, Bioeffect, Marvis and more. 

DTB introduces brands to the market and establishes distribution networks through a whole suite of services that include in-house branding, digital marketing, distribution and visual merchandising, trade/retailer engagement and training. More importantly, its trusted supply chain ensures the authenticity of products that are delivered to the customers.
 
DTB’s quick success led to FMCG labels being added in 2020, as these brands were looking to capture the Asian markets, widely acknowledged to be the fastest-growing globally.  

DTB have acquired 14 brand-exclusive distributorships in Singapore including BIOEFFECT, MAVIS, EMBRYOLISSE and ISDIN. With consumer needs rapidly evolving and becoming more demanding, DTB will continue to grow its niche brands and cult classics to be made available to Asian consumers.

description:
Established in 1965, Corlison is the largest fully Singapore owned FMCG distributor in our country.

We distribute internationally renowned personal/health/skin care and home cleaning brands locally. We also fully own and market the Pearlie White oral care brand (the first Singapore oral care brand and the only oral care brand that manufactures in our country) internationally.

With the unique position of being both a brand owner and a distributor; we know exactly what you want as a brand owner; for a distributor to accomplish for your brand. 

What do brand owners want? 
They want to work with a distribution partner that invests significantly in the distribution and marketing of their brand today, so that both brand owner and distributor can enjoy the much larger fruits of their labor tomorrow. I.e. In a long term distribution partnership, your distributor must invest aggressively now to help you gain market share. And both can take profits years later when your brand becomes the market share leader. 
We want a distributor that can sell on traditional retail and ecommerce channels and market on both traditional and digital mediums. 
We want a distributor that can handle everything from importation to registration to key account management to deliveries to customer service etc. 

And most importantly, we want a distributor who knows how to accomplish the hardest task of all. To get the consumer that are using that other brand, to switch to yours. 

We help you accomplish this with our full-service distribution model and our full complement of team members/capabilities. And we invest along with our brand principals for the long term success of their brands in our marketplace.

description:
The Silversky’s Vision – Delivering WOW!
With more than a decade of experience in the pet’s industry in Singapore, Silversky is an established player in the pets’ market, acting as a true distribution leader for natural, premium pet food and supplies in Singapore, Malaysia and Indonesia. At Silversky, we love pets, and we are obsessed with delivering the best to pets and pet parents, and our esteemed business partners, hence Delivering WOW! This long term vision impacts everything that we do – bringing value from distribution, to the end-consumers.

Silversky currently handles more than 20 international pet brands – and up to date, we are servicing more than 230 pet retailers and online stores in Singapore alone.

The Silversky Mission – To Deliver The Best to Pets and Pet Parents
We are passionate to bring the best to pets and pet parents. We work together with international pet brands to deliver only the best pet products in the market. Our impeccable reputation is built upon by keeping the mission close to our hearts; doing business with uncompromising values of integrity, care and the highest level of professionalism.

description:
Dixon Singapore is a premier manufacturer and supplier of material transfer products, across a wide range of markets – mining, oil & gas, industry, marine, fire protection, food & beverage, irrigation and petrochemical.

Dixon is committed to being the easiest company to do business with and has an unsurpassed reputation of producing safe and leak free products for more than 100 years.  Founded by Howard W Goodall in 1916 through visiting construction sites, Howard identified their hose and coupling requirements and started manufacturing purpose-built product solutions.  Headquartered in Chestertown, Maryland in the United States of America, Dixon has grown to be a leading innovator in the hose coupling industry.

With sales and distribution centres in  Singapore, China & Australia, Dixon utilises its application based knowledge and current technologies to create products to solve challenges across a wide range of material transfer applications. 

Dixon Singapore is focused on providing value add services, superior customer service, technical support and training; ensuring its customers can connect with the right parts just at the right time.

description:
Limwood, incorporated in 2018 and headquartered in Singapore, specialises in the import and distribution (Trade, Wholesale & Retail) of Food & Beverage Products from boutique gourmet producers around the world. 

Many of the passionate Producers we represent come from multi-generational, family-owned businesses and our vision is to enable them to continue creating incredible produce for many more years to come. 

Inspired by the discerning foodies and enthusiasts, every product sourced is personally curated to reflect our due care and attention to provenance and quality. From award-winning wineries, distilleries, breweries and farms, we are dedicated to sharing these wonderful artisanal “harvests” to fellow gourmands.

With a strong focus on providing informative and engaging knowledge to our customers, Limwood works hand-in-hand with our Producers to create content which depicts their brands' ethos, heritage and passion. 

We are proud to bring these incredible products to market in Singapore and beyond.

description:
Excel Hardware is a local hardware & home furnishing brand founded in 1998, to create a platform for interior designers and homeowners to purchase and own hardware products that are safe, durable, and sustainable.

Excel Hardware prides itself by focusing on the customer’s journey throughout purchases. From general enquiries to after-sales services, Excel Hardware has a dedicated team ready to provide personalised support and assistance for all customers. In addition, all Excel Hardware products have complimentary life-time warranty for Excel Preferred Partners (EPP) and undergo rigorous safety & durability tests before being sold, ensuring that all products are held to the highest industry standards.

Finally, Excel Hardware believes that sustainability is the key to long-term success. In support of Singapore’s focus on sustainable development, Excel Hardware has converted to a 90% e-commerce business, reducing the need to print more than half of its traditional materials.

Excel Hardware’s mission is to become the #1 Singapore legacy for safety cabinet hinges, and Excel Hardware’s vision is to be the vital link to connect people, businesses, and communities, inspiring and empowering the highest industry standards for a sustainable future.

description:
Fire Terminator International is a Singapore-based manufacturer and provider of innovative fire fighting solutions. We specialize in developing green, non-toxic, and PFAS-free fire suppression products for all classes of fires, including forest fires. With a strong commitment to environmental sustainability and safety, we offer cutting-edge solutions that prioritize both effective fire control and ecological responsibility.
Green Fire Suppression Solutions: We have developed a range of environmentally friendly fire suppression agents that are highly effective in extinguishing fires while minimizing harm to the environment. Our solutions are free from PFAS (Per- and Polyfluoroalkyl Substances) and other toxic chemicals, making them safe for use in a variety of settings.
Customized Firefighting Solutions: We understand that different industries have unique fire risks and requirements. That's why we offer customized firefighting solutions tailored to specific sectors, including refineries, chemical plants, tank farms, and more. Our team of experts works closely with clients to develop and implement effective fire control strategies that mitigate risks and ensure optimal safety.
AI-Aided Firefighting Solutions: Leveraging the power of artificial intelligence (AI), we provide advanced firefighting solutions that incorporate smart technology. Our AI systems analyze real-time data from various sensors and devices, allowing for early fire detection and proactive response. By harnessing IoT technology, we create integrated systems that enhance the effectiveness and efficiency of fire control measures.
At Fire Terminator International, our mission is to provide state-of-the-art fire fighting solutions that prioritize environmental sustainability, human safety, and efficient fire control. We are dedicated to developing innovative products and leveraging cutting-edge technologies to address fire risks effectively while minimizing ecological impact.

description:
Alltek Technology Singapore Pte Ltd is a majority-owned subsidiary of Alltek Technology Corporation Group, a professional communication solution and electronics components distributor publicly listed in the Taiwan Stock Exchange. Alltek Singapore was established in 2000 and serves as a regional base for the Group in the South-Asia region. Alltek Singapore has been building a strong reputation in providing modern equipments for unified communication, electronics components and digital consumer products. Today, Alltek Singapore carries many leading brands and distributing their products through our service network in many regional countries such as Singapore, Malaysia, Indonesia, Thailand, Philippine, Vietnam, Myanmar, Cambodia, Laos and Brunei.
 
OUR MISSION

Alltek Technology Singapore aims to become the leading regional distribution and value partner for leading brands in communication, marine and digital consumer products. We serve our customers by bringing the most innovative, high quality and technologically-advanced products and solutions with excellent after-sales services and support. 

We welcome any company or brand needing a reliable partner in the South-Asia region for their products to contact us at sales@alltek.sg

company_name: Orca - At the top of your food chain
description:
Since 2009, Orca Marketing has been Singapore’s premier partner for premium meat and seafood solutions. Born from deep roots in the seafood trade and nurtured through a passion for uncompromising quality, we serve as the reliable supply chain link between the world’s best protein producers and Singapore’s top kitchens.

We specialise in sourcing, processing, and delivering chilled, live, and frozen meat and seafood from trusted origins, including Australia, New Zealand, Japan, and beyond. Over time, we have expanded into beef, lamb, pork, and deli products, growing our portfolio to meet the evolving needs of the foodservice sector.

Our portfolio includes some of the world’s most respected producers, from Blackmore and Stone Axe Wagyu to Little Joe, Portoro, Gooralie Free Range Pork, Kinross Station Lamb, Akaroa King Salmon, Fremantle Octopus, Yarra Valley Caviar, and more. These partnerships ensure every cut and catch reflects the highest standards of quality, sustainability, and provenance.

Through our integrated butchery facility in Senoko, we provide custom processing, SFA-licensing compliance, and same-day delivery across Singapore, ensuring precision, consistency, and speed for our clients.

Our retail arm, Butcher Box, brings these premium proteins directly to consumers while supporting F&B customers through wholesale solutions, all backed by Orca’s robust supply chain, storage, and distribution infrastructure.

If you’re a chef, purchasing manager, or hotel GM seeking a dependable partner with supply certainty, premium sourcing, and personalised service, connect with us. Let’s build a relationship that gives your kitchen access to the finest ingredients, delivered with the consistency and care your menu deserves.

description:
We, Wismettac Group was established in 1912 as a trading company in Kobe, have continued to provide the wealth and joy of eating to people all over the world, focusing on Asian food including Japanese food and agricultural products. In Asian food global business, our private brand “Shirakiku” is well known in North America and other parts of the world. In Agricultural products trading business, we procure a wide range of fresh fruits and vegetables, frozen processed products from around the world and sell them both in Japan and overseas. In 2017, we were listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange, and it makes us a prominent global company both in Japan and throughout the world. We will provide people around the world with fresh experiences in eating and enjoyable daily lives by promoting Asian food as well as Japanese fruits and vegetables, and we will contribute to the happiness and prosperity of those involved in the food industry by providing transformative solutions to various issues and needs in the industry by leveraging the network we have established thus far. Keeping in mind these corporate philosophies and the social responsibilities that we should fulfil, we will strive to further evolve as a company in the food industry.

description:
Kewpie Singapore Pte Ltd was formerly known as Minato Singapore Pte Ltd. Kewpie Singapore was established in October 2020 as a sales office.

Kewpie’s Long-Lasting Legacy Of Great Taste, Empathy, And Uniqueness
Since 1925, it has been Kewpie’s corporate belief that enhancing the quality of food takes more than just transcending flavours, but it takes the mindset and the drive to prioritise the importance of maintaining great health for everyone in the family. Kewpie Group’s goal is to continually contribute to the world’s food culture and health through great taste, empathy, and uniqueness. Both executives and employees work faithfully to provide special, choice goods and services in order to earn our customers’ trust. With that, everybody at Kewpie is proud to have inherited the beliefs of Toichiro Nakashima, the founder of Kewpie Corporation, with regard to how job motivation comes from enjoying work with people who have the same ambitions and rejoicing together in this mission.

Putting Quality First
Ensuring food safety and great taste, enabling consumers to lead fulfilling, healthy lives through food is of vital importance to our mission. As a group, we all adhere to the “Quality First” principle in our work. We strive for personnel development to ensure high quality systems that underpin the Company’s quality, and the pursuit of technologies that enhance quality.

description:
LHS is a regional provider of industrial connectivity, automation, and digital infrastructure solutions, supporting manufacturers, buildings, utilities, and mission-critical facilities across Southeast Asia.

Founded in 1997, we have grown from a trusted distributor into a multi-country solutions integrator delivering end-to-end capabilities across networking, control, Industry 4.0, and sustainability technologies. Our ecosystem brings together leading global partners and in-house technical expertise to help organisations modernise operations, enhance reliability, and accelerate digital transformation.

Our capabilities span:
• Industrial Connectivity & Networking
Rugged switches, networking infrastructure, fiber systems, wireless connectivity, GPON/XPON, IEC 61850 architectures, and secure OT networks for factories, plants, utilities, and transportation.

• Automation & Control Systems
PLC, I/O, machine connectivity, edge integration, protocol bridging, and field-to-cloud interoperability for Industry 4.0 readiness.

• Smart Infrastructure & Building Systems
Unified BMS, automation controls, access systems, structured cabling, audiovisual connectivity, and digital infrastructure for intelligent buildings and campuses.

• Digital & AI Solutions
AI-driven energy optimisation, digital twins, carbon management platforms, indoor navigation intelligence, and data-driven facility performance technologies.

With offices in Singapore and Malaysia and planned expansion across Southeast Asia, LHS combines strong local support with regional execution capability. Our team works closely with system integrators, consultants, contractors, and technology partners to design, implement, and support reliable, scalable solutions.

Our mission is to deliver the connectivity, control, and intelligence that power the industries and infrastructure of tomorrow.

description:

description:
Previously Natron International in Singapore we have been acquired & now rebranded as MacLean International Group, part of the DNOW group of companies.  
In Singapore we are a seasoned team of professionals specialising in the supply of industrial & hazardous area electrical, lighting, cabling, cable solutions & valves.  We have a proven industry track record with an unwavering commitment to timely, cost effective & superior product delivery.
Utilising state-of-the-art systems & equipment we manage the provision of a reliable & efficient service for our customers.  Whatever the project size or location we can optimise supply chain management by helping to reduce supplier numbers, speed order processing & ease materials management. As a trusted & reliable partner, we provide assistance with material specification, product application, sourcing, manufacturer bid evaluation, procurement, certification, documentation, translation, inspection, packing & logistics & materials management.

MACLEAN INTERNATIONAL GROUP
A multiple commodity global business, we are world class specialists in the global supply & management of electrical products, lighting systems & cables, valves, PPE & safety, OEM drilling consumables, MRO & tooling for harsh & hazardous environments in onshore, offshore & renewable energy, petrochemical, process, marine, industrial, data centre & infrastructure applications.

description:
Vit8 is a wholesaler and importer of frozen tropical fruit pulps and has been incorporated in Singapore since 2011.
Fruits are processed into frozen fruit pulp shortly after harvest so as to maintain the freshness and quality of the ripe fruit.
Vit8 implements the highest standard of quality control to ensure the top quality of final products. Quality control methods at the Vit8 frozen pulp factory includes:
Powered freezing tunnels to better preserve nutritional and the sensory qualities of the pulp
Equipment to heat pulp and reduce its air content in order to minimize the enzymatic degradation of the pulp.
Top-quality automatic processing and pasteurization unit, designed and built in Italy.
Opportunity to process in the factory some of the fruit varieties cultivated in the adjacent fruit plantation.
It is made of 100% handpicked Brazilian fresh fruits which are processed at the optimal stage of ripeness according to an accurate production process which involves weighing the ripened fruits individually.
No sugar, preservatives or colouring are added to maintain the exceptional nutritional qualities of Brazilian fresh fruits.
Vit8 is collaborating with several cafes to provide Açai, Açerola and Graviola (Soursop) for a new range of smoothies available.
Vit8 frozen tropical fruit pulps are ideal to prepare excellent juices, smoothies, sorbets and yoghurts.
Full range of products by Vit8 includes:
Açai
Açerola
Cajá
Caju (Cashew)
Goiaba (Guava)
Graviola (Soursop)
Mango

description:
Trevno is a globally recognized company founded in 2016, since inception has evolved into a leading player in the healthcare and consumer goods industry. With offices in Singapore, Malaysia, Morocco and London, Trevno specializes in distributing and manufacturing premier healthcare products, including pharmaceuticals, over-the-counter (OTC) items, consumer health products, medical consumables, and medical devices.
We prioritise building long-term relationships over conducting transactions. We are dedicated to creating breakthrough products and are deeply invested in understanding the needs of our clients and customers. Our team is passionate about utilizing cutting-edge science and technology to tackle the everyday healthcare and consumer goods challenges faced by society.

Our success is driven by our expertise in innovation and formulation, supply chain management, sourcing, regulatory compliance, and sales and marketing. We constantly strive to identify new business opportunities and excel in operational efficiency to fuel growth for both our partners and ourselves.

In 2022, Trevno has further expanded its portfolio by venturing into the commodities and minerals trading and supply industry. We also offer a wide range of maritime services including ship management, chartering, and ship supplies. This diversification allows us to provide our clients and partners with a comprehensive range of products and services to meet their diverse needs. We are dedicated to continuing our tradition of excellence in all our new ventures, with a focus on innovation, operational excellence, and building long-term relationships.

description:
Tai Wah started as a partnership in 1956 with offices in Singapore, Malaysia and Hongkong. Major brands marketed and distributed previously by Tai Wah includes Wella, Ella Bache, Sothys, Nemectron, Takara and 4711.

In 1985, Tai Wah entered into joint ventures with Wella AG in a manufacturing plant in Malaysia and distribution companies in Singapore, Malaysia and Hongkong. Tai Wah has since divested all its interests in these joint ventures.

Over the years, Tai Wah has developed an extensive professional (hair and beauty salon) distribution network in South East Asia and China. It currently markets and distributes these brands – Kadus, Depileve/Anesi, Payot, Wahl.

Tai Wah entered the Chinese market in the late 1990s and today has interests in manufacturing facilities in China – manufacturing hair equipment like hairdryers, hair irons, and machines for hair and beauty salons. It has developed its own range of hair and beauty equipment, machine and accessories under the Tuft trademark. At the same time it also markets and sell the OEM services of these factories in China.

Tai Wah today has taken a more global view of its business interests and currently services a wide customer base from all over the world in the sale of the products from its manufacturing facilities in China. In addition it is promoting and marketing its own brand of hair and beauty equipment and machines under the Tuft label.

Tai Wah also provides sourcing services to foreign companies interested in selling product to or buying products from China. Foreign companies requiring such services will find Tai Wah’s ability to render effective and reliable communication services and its reputation for honesty and ethical practices together with its fully operational office/showroom in China attractive and suitable to the needs.

description:
The Hawley & Hazel Group is a reliable and trusted manufacturer of high quality oral care products, including the world-renowned Darlie brand of toothpastes and toothbrushes. 

Established in 1933, Hawley & Hazel has enjoyed a long history as one of the most respected and recognised oral care names in Asia. Darlie toothpastes and toothbrushes are a firm family favourite for generations of consumers across the region. Building on decades of research and innovation, Hawley & Hazel continues to develop new and exciting oral care products that meet the expectations of discerning consumers everywhere. 

We are dedicated to developing and manufacturing leading edge oral hygiene products that harness the latest technology and some of the most state-of-the-art ideas in the industry. It is our goal to give our consumers a healthy and sparkling white smile, enabling them to feel attractive and confident, wherever they are. The Hawley & Hazel Group's commercial efforts have attained significant success, and Hawley & Hazel's toothpaste products, sold under the Darlie brand, are a bestselling household name throughout the region. 

Today, Darlie toothpaste is one of the market leaders in China, Hong Kong, Taiwan, Singapore, Malaysia and Thailand, synonymous with clean white teeth and a confident smile everywhere.

Our number one goal is to provide quality safety products available on the market to our customers in Singapore in order to make shopping for health and safety products as easy as possible.

Northrock Safety is your best resource for emergency rescue professionals to find first aid supplies and valuable gear. description:
The story of Singmah Steel Refrigeration Pte Ltd began in Singapore, in the year 2003. The startup operated on the premise of developing close relationships with customers through excellent, dependable customer service and high quality products that were manufactured by the company themselves.

This focus on manufacturing their own products allowed Singmah Steel Refrigeration Pte Ltd to excel, consistently delivering top quality equipment to customers at reasonable prices. Best of all, because the products were manufactured by the company themselves, customising, maintaining and servicing the equipment was carried out in a prompt, timely manner – perfect for the fast paced food & beverage industry, where a single day of downtime can be disastrous.

Because of their commitment to quality products and services, Singmah Steel Refrigeration Pte Ltd’s reputation kept growing, fuelled by strong word of mouth appraisals and recommendations.

Today, over many years since its inception, the company prides itself on being one of the pioneers in the food & beverage industry, and one of the largest, most trusted names in Singapore.

Experience what our products and services can do for your business. Speak with us, our friendly team of representatives are always happy to help.

description:
Premier's Tea Moods is the exclusive distributor of Premier's Tea for Singapore and the region. 

Premier's Tea is renowned worldwide amongst the discerning Tea drinkers for its passion for purity. With a myriad of teas, be it Darjeeling - the Queen of Teas, the ever popular Assam, the taste and heritage-rich Masala Chai, the famous Earl Grey or English breakfast, all of Premier's Tea products uses high-quality tea leaves procured from Tea Gardens with the same focus on quality. 

These tea leaves are then brought back to Premier's Tea's own state of the art manufacturing plant in Calcutta, India to be processed, purified & packed before being shipped out worldwide. Premier's Tea is a handful of Tea Brands that are given the rights to use the Geographical Indicator (GI) marks of Darjeeling, Assam, Nilgri & Kangra, a privilege accorded by the Tea Board of India to only those who pack 100% of the original teas from the specific regions.

Driven by a Passion for Purity, Premier's Tea Moods aims to make gourmet quality Tea an affordable choice for Tea Lovers.

description:

Join FourFront Asia in redefining washroom solutions across Asia—where innovation meets craftsmanship, and every dispenser, wastebin, and accessory is designed to elevate your space.

description:

They also prioritise the welfare and interests of their members and receive financial support from them.

The association has a long-standing relationship with the Wheat Association of America and uses "Wheat" as its logo. Today, the association continues to supply baking essentials to businesses and individuals. It is also opening a new retail store called "Wheat" to cater to the needs of businesses and home bakers in Singapore.

description:
CX OFFICE SYSTEM : The leading office furniture manufacturer in Malaysia
Established in 2000, CX Office System has expanded over the last 15 years to become an unrivalled, one-stop solution for office workspace requirements. CX has strategically positioned itself as a competitive office furniture manufacturer in Malaysia, and expanding its product ranges as well as its sales operation in both Malaysia and Singapore.

Operating from state-of-the-art 70,000 sq ft factory in Ulu Tiram, in the Johor, at the West of Malaysia, CX has worked with some of the largest blue-chip companies in the country, as well as home-based and small to medium sized businesses. Unlike many office furniture suppliers in the market today, we are committed to finding you office furniture that is superior in quality and design, yet is practical and durable, with a one to five years guarantee.

As well as our meticulous attention-to-detail, at CX Office System and Interiors we understand that a successful working environment is dependent upon successful space management, the consideration of practical requirements and the ability to complete a project on time, to budget and the fulfilment of any design or architectural constraints.

Our enterprising and experienced professionals can oversee all aspects of your office refurbishment such as office interiors design, space planning and office furniture, providing advice, visual interpretation of ideas, site surveys and a complete project implementation and management service.

This can include suspended ceilings, office security and telecommunications, office partitioning, painting and decorating, audio visual installation, racking, shelving and storage walls. We also offer bespoke office furniture and office accessories.

So when you need some office furniture and want to see the most comprehensive range, contact us. Welcome any quotation.
Please contact us at Phone: +65 8716 3536 or E-Mail: jun@cxsystem.com.sg

description: Ah Pau Chop began as a family business handed down from one generation to another while upholding the family motto of ‘The root of Chinese Heritage’. The company has made significant progress since its humble beginnings as a small retail cart selling dried provisions along the Singapore River in the 1950s and along Teo Chew Street in the early 1960s. Ah Pau Chop was officially established as a partnership business in 1976 and transformed itself into a wholesale-cum-retail business model, serving major restaurant chains and the general population, situated at Victoria Street Wholesale Centre in Bugis. Over the decades, Ah Pau Chop continued to serve its customers with dedication and has now become a popular go-to destination for festive goods by Singaporeans during the Lunar New Year festive season. Today, the business has relocated to the Victoria Wholesale Centre in Kallang and continues to garner a strong following by its clientele.

description:
Nanyang Gum Benjamin (MFG) Pte Ltd has accumulated more than 60 years of experience in the production and quality control of Gum Benjamin. Commonly known as Lobans or Gum Benzoin, this incense product is heavily used during cultural and religious practices by people of different background, with the aim of enhancing positive emotional energy. Nanyang Gum Benjamin believes in sourcing for the most suitable raw materials and processing of other gum products in line with our products. Over the years, we have exported our products to places across Asia, Europe, the Middle East, North Africa, and the Americas. We manufacture different grades of Gum Benjamin, supplying them in bulk packaging, depending on the needs of the buyer. 

We firmly practice the philosophy of customer-orientation, and to support this principle, we have built a trustworthy network with deep product knowledge and strict quality control. Our emphasis on quality standards has, therefore, made us a reputable and long-term supplier for different client groups across different continents, as we ensure that our products meets the requirements of our client and the marketplace. Our flagship brands such as NGB-Cannon and NGB-Eye has achieved significant market presence in the incense industry. 

Nanyang Gum Benjamin has stood the test of time and overcome the challenges of the economy through constant improvement in our manufacturing process. Continuing the legacy of trust and excellence, Nanyang Gum Benjamin resonates with dedication and quality. We are honoured to have trustworthy suppliers and clients working with us. We look forward to exploring new opportunity for collaboration and partnership locally and internationally while upholding our values.

description:
Faust Innovations Pte. Ltd. is a Singapore based distribution channel focused on Asia and the Middle East.  Our company was founded by entrepreneurs and business leaders who have had environmental and healthy living concerns at the forefront of their thinking for the past 20 years.

Antimicrobial Technology:
Our business is the distribution of innovative products that can change the landscape of society. Products that offer a solution to the societal challenges that we face without causing harm to the world that future generations will inherit.  Products that ensure healthy living both now and in the future.
The products we distribute contain a patented Antimicrobial Plastic Additive (known as d2p AM) that protects against harmful microbes that thrive on the surface of plastic products and other human contact surfaces.
This Antimicrobial Plastic Additive has been tested and proven to create virus reduction of 99.9% in one hour, and are resistant to various forms of algae, bacteria, fungi (mildew, yeasts and moulds).
The potential uses of d2p includes:  medical face masks, gloves (both household and hospital use—nitrile, latex), plastic food containers, plastic food wrap, hospital gowns, shoe boots, hair caps, etc.

OXO Biodegradable Technology:
Certain of the products that we distribute are treated with the additive d2w, which is an oxo biodegradable additive included in the masterbatch production process of plastics manufacturing.  This masterbatch turns ordinary plastic, at the end of its useful life, into a material that readily degrades in the presence of oxygen and sunlight (UV light).
This material degrades in a continuous process that leaves no harmful residue, only carbon dioxide, water and biomass.The potential uses of d2p includes:  medical face masks, gloves (both household and hospital use), plastic food containers, plastic food wrap, hospital gowns, shoe boots, hair caps, etc. Our d2w treated products include face masks, gloves, food packaging products.

description:
Over a decade of skincare
Dermedex began in 1996, with the mission to bring the best beauty products from all over the world to our customers. The story started with our founder, Peggy Eng, whom has been a professionally trained and certified skincare therapy veteran for over two decades.

Peggy's passion for skincare transcends beyond her role of a therapist to that of a entrepreneur, spotting a lack in a skincare range that can truly provide quick and effective results to solve problematic skin issues. Thus the birth of Dermedex.

Dermedex now serves over 1,000 beauty salons worldwide, and has impacted over 1 million customers.

East meets West
Her pursuit for beauty perfection has led her to continuously search for the highest quality beauty products from all over the world to form the most ideal skin care line – one that combines the best technologies from the East and West, so as to effectively solve all sorts of skincare problems.

Made by professionals for professionals
Peggy believes in beauty products made by professional for professionals, and making them available for everyday women. She emphasizes on the importance of professional advice and education that certified beauty salon can bring to the end consumer. This, coupled with the effective use of Dermedex products has dramatically helped eradicate many clients' skincare problems, enabling them to achieve the beautify skin that they deserve.

description:

Following the acquisition of Sin Ghee Huat Coporation Pte Ltd in 2021, HH Group holds the largest, most comprehensive stainless-steel inventory in Singapore, with over 12,000 tons of stainless steel products housed across 3 warehouses, together with an extensive network of contacts, expertise
and solutions. HH Group has successfully forged trusted partnerships with globally recognised suppliers from Europe, China, Japan, Taiwan and South Korea, enabling access to an undisrupted supply of high-performance metal products.

Headed by HH Group, our company comprises of two key divisions: 

HH Stainless Pte Ltd (HHS)
Primary business; distributor of stainless-steel products.

HH Special Metal Pte Ltd (HHSM)
Secondary business; distributor of high-performance materials such as nickel alloys, chrome alloys, duplex stainless steel

description:
Founded in 1953 as one of the pioneers in the refrigeration and air-conditioning business in Singapore, Far East Group Limited (formerly known as Far East Refrigeration (Pte.) Limited) is a comprehensive provider of refrigeration and air-conditioning systems and products in the heating, ventilation, air-conditioning and refrigeration ("HVAC&R") industry. Our Directors believe that we are one of the leading regional distributors of commercial and light industrial refrigeration systems and products in the South-east Asia region.

Our Group has a broad customer base of more than 1,000 active customers, including distributors, dealers as well as refrigeration and air-conditioning contractors who use our products and services to provide comprehensive refrigeration and air-conditioning systems to endusers, such as supermarkets, cold store distribution centres, food processing and catering facilities, hotels, hospitals, food and beverage establishments, convenient stores, petrol stations, marine vessels, oil rigs and barges.

Besides sourcing and distributing agency products, our Group also manufactures our in-house "Eden" brand of heat exchangers and condensing units. In particular, our products are widely recognised and used by well-known international and regional retail chains such as Carrefour, Metro, Tesco, Giant, Cold Storage and NTUC FairPrice as well as Resorts World Sentosa and Marina Bay Sands.

Headquartered in Singapore, our Group has subsidiaries in Singapore, Malaysia and Hong Kong as well as representative offices in Vietnam and Indonesia. We also have approximately 20 distributors and dealers in countries including Malaysia, Thailand, the Philippines, Myanmar, Mauritius, Vietnam, Sri Lanka and Indonesia.

In line with our growth, our Group's revenue rose from approximately S$29.2 million in FY2008 to approximately S$32.6 million in FY2010, while net profit rose from approximately S$1.0 million in FY2008 to approximately S$4.6 million in FY2010.

description:
We help businesses better promote and sell their products in countries it would otherwise be very difficult for them to reach and make a significant impact.

Our services are tailored specifically to small and medium enterprises that do not currently employ an export manager and want to tap into new markets without burdening their company's internal infrastructure at any given time.

We are an established and unique company with successful strategies to help our clients penetrate new markets, increase export activities and forge business relationships in Southeast Asia.
 
OUR HISTORY:
The history of YEM started in Italy in 2012, where our CEO & Founder was working alone with only three manufacturers. Today, from our Singapore HQ and our offices in Jakarta, Ho Chi Minh, Hanoi, Manila, Bangkok, and Kuala Lumpur, we work with and expand the business of the over 30 manufacturers in our portfolio. Over the last 20 years, we have developed a professional relationship with a large Distributors and System Integrators network.
 
OUR MISSION:
To be the fastest and most sustainable way to sell your products into Southeast Asia. We develop and execute marketing strategies to enhance your brand identity in new markets. All commercial actions are constantly analyzed by Chief Operating Officers, Country Managers, and Pre and After Sales Managers who conduct over 500 meetings and manage 2000 sales opportunities every month to help you increase brand awareness.

description:

Our business is to add value and flexibility to the supply chain of our customers.

description:
SolAgri Pte Ltd  is headquartered in Singapore and is involved in the international trade of agriculture products namely Cotton, Cashew, Soybeans, Oilseeds, and Pulses. We source these products primarily from Africa (East and West Africa) through our own procurement network. description:

We are a German ruled team based in Singapore with many years of experience in the international sale of food and many other product areas. 

As a result, we have built excellent business relationships worldwide and this way we stay up to date with the latest trends that we are happy to offer you.

KS-Trading International represents established brands from Germany and other parts of Europe, UK ,USA and Australia is a certified exclusive distributor of many brands that we offer in Southeast Asia and beyond. 

We mainly deal with grocery – from sweet to savory, from dry to frozen but also we offer a huge range of high-quality baby food and care, health & body care products and many products from other categories.

Our warehouse and forwarding agent is located in Hamburg, D-21035, from where we can offer our customers direct sea / air freight handling overseas in order to save valuable time.

We are proud to serve our wholesale customers with sales channels in Southeast Asia and well-known retail chains.

Satisfied customers are our top priority and that is why we work with a great sense of responsibility and German precision.

You can expect a reliable deliveries and competent and fast processing in all areas, directly from Germany and our goal to build and maintain a long-term, reliable, confidential and mutually beneficial relationship with all of our partners.

Thank you very much in advance and we hope to hear soon from you!

Sincerely
Edwin Stephan Kalin

description:
Alkemal was established in 1962 as an Importer and Exporter of Timber. In 1982, Alkemal was incorporated as a private limited company Headquartered in Singapore.
 
It has offices and agents in all major buying and selling centers such as India, Bangladesh, Vietnam, Myanmar, Nigeria, Ghana, Panama, Ecuador and Costa Rica, Brazil & Indonesia.

Observing the highest standard of integrity and honesty, the company uses its extensive network to ensure deliveries in accordance with agreed specifications and deadlines, in order to meet client needs and expectations.

Through the years, Alkemal Singapore Pte Ltd. has continued to achieve its objectives and meet its target with the support of a global clientele and the guidance and assistance of Alkemal’s, dedicated and committed managers.
The leadership of Mr. Daljit Singh - Director of the Company, Mr. Charanjit Wadalia - Manager of Myanmar Operations, and Mr. Kanwaljit Sodhi - Manager of Latin America/Africa operations, has nurtured Alkemal and its employees with their positive and innovative attitudes.

Alkemal cannot operate in isolation, and considers its trusty suppliers and providers as members of their team. We ensure all dealings are fair and reasonable no matter how big or small. We are very grateful to our team and look forward for many more successful years together.

description:

 Our Core Services

To make global business accessible by connecting companies with the right opportunities, trusted partners, and expert guidance — ensuring smooth, compliant, and sustainable international growth.

We aim to be more than just a service provider — we are your strategic partner for global expansion. Every client receives personalized solutions, reliable support, and long-term commitment to success.

description:
G. D. Colmo Traders Pte. Ltd. is a company that specializes in providing a wide and extensive range of 2W (Two-Wheeler) and 3W (Three-Wheeler) accessories. Their product selection covers various categories such as Body Parts, Tyres & Tubes from leading brands, Hoods, fancy mirrors, mud guards, bumpers, grips, horns, and more. The company prides itself on being a convenient and creative source for customers looking to develop products and programs in their respective markets.

One notable aspect of their business is their ability to supply a comprehensive range of spare parts, ranging from the smallest nuts and bolts to complete vehicle engines. The company has established relationships with major distributors of renowned companies, enabling them to fulfill orders efficiently without compromising on the allocation of each spare part. This efficiency is reflected in their capability to completely fill containers within a relatively short timeframe of 30-45 days from the confirmation of the order.

G. D. Colmo Traders Pte. Ltd. extends its services to various international markets, including Colombia, Peru, Egypt, Sri Lanka, and Guatemala. description:

Our mission is to promote fair prices for our growers, while also investing in education, healthcare, and infrastructure in the communities we work with. We believe in sustainable practices and reducing waste, and we are constantly looking for ways to improve our operations and minimize our environmental impact.
At Fresh Harvest SG Pte. Ltd., we work closely with our local growers to ensure that we source only the best and most delicious fruits from the Philippines. We are dedicated to providing exceptional customer service and supporting our customers in every way possible. We understand the high standards of our customers, and we strive to meet and exceed their expectations with every order.
Join our network on LinkedIn to stay up-to-date on the latest news and trends in the fruit industry, as well as our latest products and promotions. We welcome your comments, questions, and feedback, and we look forward to connecting with you.

description:
Who We Are
Xpand Tradings is a trading & distribution company which focuses on distribution of FMCG F&B category products that satisfy the tagline “Quality with Convenience.” We seek out products from sources that do not compromise on quality, while giving value for money for every product we offer. 
Our strength is in seeking out ‘hidden gems’ from unconventional sources while ensuring. That the production practices they use maintains the integrity of good manufacturing practices, safety of the products & the quality. We focus on a range of products for the modern family, keeping in mind the challenges of the frantic pace of living in this modern world. 

Why should you choose us for your distribution needs?
We operate on a 3 R sourcing framework to ensure our partners and their products enjoy optimal market penetration and the best chance for maximum sales revenue.
We employ a 3R Framework approach in our client engagement. This unique framework allows us to keep an active level of engagement with our partners throughout our partnership. In turn, this active engagement helps us define our search for the type of products we distribute in line with our guiding philosophy. This is crucial to ensure the following:

A. For our Producer/ Manufacturer Partner
This framework allows them to access to real time data on what kind of market entry strategies will best work for their products. This allows optimum sharing and market intel so that both parties can choose wisely on everything from product range, pricing strategy and brand building initiatives. Clear marketing plans and costings can be derived from the collected data to optimise profits for both parties.

B. For our customers.
Whether it is for B2B or B2C customers, we bring in quality products and go the extra mile to bundle and package our products so that economies of scale can be enjoyed even in small orders. With certain conditions met, we can supply the high amount for the right price.

description:
French, with a deep-rooted love for wine, had spent the last two decades immersed in the vibrant culture of Asia. His journey had taken him from bustling metropolises to serene countryside, where he discovered a growing appreciation for fine wines among the region's discerning consumers.

Inspired by this newfound passion, he decided to bridge the gap between the rich wine heritage of Europe & the “New World” and the burgeoning wine market of Asia. He envisioned a company that would introduce a curated selection of exceptional wines to Asian palates, while also promoting wine culture and education.

His extensive knowledge of wine, coupled with his deep understanding of Asian tastes, allowed him to curate a carefully selected portfolio of wines. From the classic regions of France, Spain and Portugal to emerging wine-producing countries like South Africa, Vinolis offers a diverse range of exceptional vintages.

Each wine was chosen for its quality, character, and suitability for Asian palates. He believes that wine should be an enjoyable experience, accessible to all, and he was committed to introducing wines that would resonate with Asian consumers.

Beyond simply selling wine, Vinolis aimed to promote wine culture and education in Asia. He organizes wine tastings, seminars, and workshops to introduce people to the world of wine and help them develop their palates. description:
Established in 2015, Regis Power Pte Ltd is a proud supplier of quality Electric Motors to Marine & Offshore, Oil & Gas, Construction and other related Industries. We are one of the preferred partner and supplier of various companies in need of low, medium to high voltages motors from simple to complicated operations. Our core strength is engineered-to-order motors and drives. 

We have significant experience in Power Conversion, Power Quality, Power Supply and Power Generation (particularly from renewable energy sources). Applying our experience in electric motor industry, we were able to find the best suppliers and manufacturers of robust, reliable and premium efficiency AC motors to deliver to our clients in the ASEAN region. Whatever your power needs, whether you are looking at installing new equipment or revamping existing facilities, we can design and deliver the best solution to optimise efficiency, contributing significantly to reducing energy costs. We are also able to design and supply turnkey electric drive systems that include transformers and switchgear. 

Whether you are contemplating a new plant or need to revamp an existing facility, we can help design solutions that contribute to prolonging plant life. Our highly committed Service group has significant experience in retrofitting and motor upgrades as well as substitution of obsolete brands, and are able to offer our clients the best kind of after-sales service and technical assistance regarding their equipment. We are dedicated in improving our line of product offerings as well as service accuracy that is being challenged with each inspiring environment we’ve overcome.

Backed by our trusted rotating machine suppliers such as Hyundai, Schorch, Toshiba, NIDEC-ASI and Menzel, we look forward to a greater future of providing quality products and services that exceeds our clients’ expectations.

description:
Corsica is a mediterranean French Island quietly tucked between Provence and Tuscany, it is a hidden treasure of unspoiled charm and natural beauty. Also known as “île de beauté” (Beauty Island), what truly attracts visitors is the Corsican spirit - to be true to their heritage and way of life. These rich values are exemplified by Isula’s handcrafted products, each one thoughtfully crafted using decades of traditional know-how and homegrown harvest. With Isula, bring home an authentic taste of Corsica and be captivated by a new plethora of flavours, taste and natural goodness.

The cuisine of Corsica is well-known to foodies around the world for its originality and dishes made from locally-grown fresh with delicious Mediterranean ingredients. Some of the typical products found in Corsica include chestnuts, cheeses made exclusively with goat or sheep’s milk, high quality olive oil and alcohol such as wines, beers and liqueurs. Corsican charcuterie is considered as one of the best in the world.


Our brands and products :

Dumè Cesari : Delicatessen
Ottavi : Cheese
Colomba : Pasta
Charles Antona : Jam, Cream, Chutney & Soup
Anlain Valentini : Honey
Mavela : Whisky & Liquors
Pietra : Beer
Biscuiterie d'Afa : Biscuit
Corsican wines

description:
Passport to your next adrenaline rush. Exponential adventure awaits.

Everything starts with a dream. Our dreams evolve and we all have many. Ours have included running the Gobi desert ultra marathon, hiking Mount Rinjani and plunging into the crystal clear waters in Western Australian for the Great Ocean Swim. As fellow adventurer and sportsman, we understand how good gear is an enabler to that dream and adventure.

At the end of the day, money cannot buy memories and these are things. But the way we see it, these things are finely crafted tools that will give you a passport to maximizing sporting performance, expand your horizons and ultimately that makes a difference to the way you experience the world. 

At Sixfive.com.sg, we love life and exploring the outdoors, and we know first-hand the importance of quality gear. We seek to bring to you the widest range of products and top brands from all around the world to your desktop, and deliver them with the utmost care to your doorstep – ensuring that you will be well-equipped for your next outdoor adventure.

We stand behind all our products with 100% satisfaction guarantee, whether you are new to outdoor adventure or a seasoned pro, we gladly share our enthusiasm for our products. We are constantly updating our site with new categories and products to better cater to your needs - blending high quality products, our unique meticulous service and great savings to give you the finest online shopping experience in Singapore.

We are the authorised premium reseller for all product brands which we carried. All products come with official warranty as provided by the manufacturers directly or their Singapore authorised distributors. We support local businesses and thus do not import products from oversea trading companies. 

Cheers with  by team Sixfive.com.sg (reg no. 201219941H)

description:
ZenHome connects you to the spiritual heartland of North India, where every purchase creates ripples of change. Since our origin, we've partnered with local artisans and farmers, helping preserve centuries-old traditions while building sustainable futures.

Key Impact:
     1. 200+ local artisans and farmers supported
     2. 5,000+ conscious consumers joined our community
     3. 1.8% of revenue pledged to girl child education

As leading wholesale importers and exporters, we specialize in Buddha Rice – an award-winning, GI-tagged variety dating back to 600 B.C. This rare, diabetic-friendly white rice carries the legacy of being Lord Buddha's blessed offering from the region where he spent his life.

Our mission? Simple. We're helping rebuild the prosperity of this remarkable region while connecting conscious consumers with products that carry centuries of spiritual heritage. Every purchase through ZenHome supports local communities and helps preserve timeless traditions.

With our pledge to invest in girl child education, we're sowing seeds for future generations in this sacred land that gave the world meditation, yoga, and Buddha's teachings. Every purchase supports artisans today and empowers tomorrow's leaders.

 Asia Pacific’s AI-Embedded Distribution Platform

description:
Premium Local Products is a company founded to bring high quality authentic products delivered right to your doorsteps.

The founders have a passion for healthy living and travelling. In every trip, they explore local authentic products to share with their families and friends. This is where the idea of bringing all natural products to people in need of premium naturals minus the middleman costs originated.

Premium Local Products also encourages people to preserve the environment. By appreciating locally-made products, you will also support the producers and farmers responsible for bringing these pure and contaminant-free products. They deserve sustainability despite the advancement in industrialization. In addition, logistics and delivery are optimized throughout the journey for a minimized carbon footprint. 

It is the value of the founders to provide their customers the best e-commerce experience of finding local products, which can be deemed difficult to obtain at your nearby local store. Upfront costs are highly reduced given there is no shop space or middleman involved in the operations of the seller.

Premium Local Products is looking forward to eliminating the challenge of purchasing authentic local items whilst promoting a healthier, more productive, and happier life. And with a deeper purpose behind the company, you can at the same time help local communities to live decently by patronizing their local qualitative ancestral productions.  

The co-founders are aiming to provide a large selection of 100 percent high quality and certified natural solutions to the community, originating from different countries worldwide. It is one of the morals of the company not only to deliver high quality solutions, but attain certifications for the products, proving their nutritional and original values that they use daily themselves.

Shop online now for the highest quality local products made available for you - https://premiumlocalproducts.com/

description:
Our History 

Founded in 2019, Alpha Bizcom Pte Ltd has been providing high-quality grocery products to businesses across the country for over 6 years. We started as a small family-owned business and have grown into one of the largest wholesale grocers in the industry.

Our Products

We offer a wide variety of products to meet the needs of our customers, including dairy, and dry goods. Our products come from the best suppliers in the industry and are always of the highest quality.

Our Services

In addition to our high-quality products, we also offer a range of services to help our customers grow their businesses. From marketing support to logistics and distribution, we are here to help you succeed.

Our Competitive Pricing

We understand that our customers need to stay competitive in the market. That's why we offer competitive pricing on all of our products, without sacrificing quality. We also offer volume discounts to help our customers save even more.

Our Customer Service

We believe that great customer service is the key to our success. Our knowledgeable and friendly staff are available to answer questions, provide guidance, and help our customers find the products they need. We also offer online ordering and fast, reliable shipping.

description:
At Top Green Organics, we take pride in being a trusted exporter of premium organic food products, delivering pure, chemical-free, and responsibly sourced ingredients to markets worldwide.

With a strong foundation built on sustainable farming and ethical sourcing, we work closely with over 200 organic farmers and farming groups to bring the finest organic produce to the global stage. Our diverse product portfolio includes:

 Organic Flours – Wheat, Rice, Multigrain, and more
 Millets & Grains – Ragi, Foxtail Millet, Quinoa, Brown Rice
 Seeds & Pulses – Chia Seeds, Flaxseeds, Moong Dal, Masoor Dal
 Spices & Superfoods – Turmeric, Black Pepper, Cumin, Moringa

We currently export hundreds of tons of organic produce annually, supplying major markets such as Singapore, Malaysia, Tanzania, Ghana, and the Philippines, with a vision to expand further.

At Top Green Organics, we are more than just exporters—we are enablers of a healthier, more sustainable future. By making high-quality organic food accessible and affordable, we empower communities to embrace better nutrition while supporting responsible agriculture

company_name: Yew Aik Hung Hardware Pte Ltd
description:
Established 80 years ago and formerly known as YEW AIK AND COMPANY LTD, we have now re-branded to YEW AIK HUNG HARDWARE PTE LTD. We specialize in distributing mechanic and workshop hand-tools, widely used by professionals and technicians. We specialize in the distribution of high-quality mechanic and workshop hand-tools, widely trusted by professionals and technicians across various industries.
We offer an extensive range of renowned brands, including ELORA tools from Germany, where we hold one of the largest inventories globally. Additionally, we distribute FORCE tools from Taiwan, SATA tools from the Apex Tool Group (USA), BRITOOL torque wrenches from the UK, and NEXUS pullers from Germany. Our premium products are ideal for the automotive, shipbuilding, manufacturing, and aviation industries, catering to all repair and maintenance needs. Our offerings are known for their exceptional value and customer satisfaction.

Our inventory includes a wide variety of tools such as Assortment & Storage Units, Spanners & Wrenches, Sockets, Impact Tools, Screwdrivers, Torque Wrenches, Electrician & Fine Mechanics Tools, Pneumatic Tools, Measuring & Checking Tools, Automotive & Special Tools, and more.

We also provide specialized services such as Foam Cutting & Fitting, where we customize foam templates to secure your tools in place within Tool Trolleys or Tool Cabinets. Additionally, our Torque Wrench Calibration services ensure precise torque measurements, ensuring fasteners are tightened to the correct tension to prevent connection failures.

We are a trusted supplier to several ST Groups and institutions, backed by strong support from our manufacturers and principals.

For more information and to discuss how we can meet your requirements, please feel free to reach out to us.

description:
Authentique Groupe, founded in 2024, specializing in sourcing and omni-channel supply chain management solutions for beauty and lifestyle products. With a team of over 10 diverse professionals (and growing) at its Singapore headquarters, we oversees a comprehensive portfolio across various categories, including skincare, personal care, fragrances, cosmetics, household and fashion products. We predominately focus on both international reknown, FMCG and luxury brands.

Our expertise lies in sourcing, distribution logistics and product management, we have built a robust global network and local capabilities, allowing us to navigate markets effectively. Currently, we are serving customers across regions including China, Taiwan, Hong Kong, Japan, Dubai (UAE), Thailand, Australia, USA, Indonesia, Phillipines, Cambodia, Vietnam, Singapore and Malaysia.

Brands of distribution are:

L'Oréal Brands: L'Oréal Paris, Garnier, Maybelline, Lancôme, Kérastase, Vichy, La Roche-Posay, Biotherm & many more.

Korean Beauty Brands: Innisfree, Etude House, Missha, Laneige, Skin 1004, Skinfood, Holika Holika, The Face Shop, COSRX, A'PIEU & many more.

International Brands: The Ordinary, Tom Ford, Estee Lauder, Dior, SK-II, Kose, Sulwhasoo, Shiseido, Clarins, Givenchy, Burberry & many more.

Lastly, we also deal in high quality OEM products. Contact us for more information.

description:
Welcome to Enzo Elite, the premier supplier of engineering spare parts for the oil and gas industry and beyond. Committed to quality, reliability, and affordability, we proudly serve clients in Singapore and around the globe, offering a comprehensive range of components tailored to enhance efficiency and productivity in various industrial sectors.

Our mission is straightforward: to become the go-to supplier for all industrial equipment needs. We provide a diverse array of products and services to clients in Singapore and beyond, ensuring that our offerings are not only of the highest quality but also affordable. Our commitment to personalized solutions and exceptional service guarantees that our clients have access to cost-effective equipment essential for their operational success.

At the heart of our operations lie our core values:

Versatility: We supply a wide range of equipment to meet the diverse needs of our clients, from standard products to specialized solutions, all at competitive prices.

Resourcefulness: Leveraging our extensive network and industry expertise, we excel at sourcing even the most hard-to-find items at prices that are fair and reasonable.

Reliability: Clients can rely on us to deliver high-quality equipment and exceptional service consistently, without breaking the bank.

Customer Satisfaction: We prioritize exceeding our clients' expectations by offering affordable solutions without compromising on quality, ensuring their utmost satisfaction with every interaction.

Enzo Elite is dedicated to supplying all types of industrial equipment and meeting any client request to the best of our ability, all while maintaining affordability. Our commitment to versatility, customer satisfaction, resourcefulness, responsiveness, collaboration, reliability, and affordability positions us as the preferred partner for industrial equipment solutions in Singapore and beyond.

description:
Established in 2007, FarLee Pte Ltd is a trusted importer and distributor of essential commodities across Singapore and the region. With a diversified portfolio that includes rice, cooking oil, sugar, and other household staples, FarLee has built a reputation for reliability, consistency, and quality in the fast-moving consumer goods (FMCG) sector.

Our brands — including Golden Jasmine, Golden Hill, Kuda Terbang, LeMe, Double Bells, OnlyPets, Lion, SUMO, and Wan Li Xiang — are widely recognised for their quality and value, catering to both commercial and household needs. We serve a broad network of business partners through B2B and B2B2C channels, supplying supermarkets, wholesalers, and foodservice operators with products that meet the highest standards of safety and freshness.

At FarLee, our mission is to provide trusted everyday staples — from every kitchen to every family. Backed by strong supplier relationships, strict quality control, and local warehousing, we ensure consistent supply, efficient delivery, and long-term dependability for our partners. With nearly two decades of experience and a proven track record in commodity trading, FarLee continues to expand its reach and uphold its promise of quality and trust across every market we serve.

description:
CAREPOINT INTERNATIONAL PTE. LTD. specialise in providing supplies on various types of disposable products in Singapore that range from medical, dental, veterinary, laboratory, home care, beauty care service as well as for the industrial use. Our gloves and face masks are manufactured in Malaysia since the late 1980s. With over 2 decades of experience in supplying medical products in Malaysia, we have expanded our products range up to over 70 types of disposable products and keep increasing every year to meet the market disposable protection needs. Our products are marketed under the brand name UNIGLOVES.

UNIGLOVES
We are a brand of professional medical disposable products. The brand is well established and can be easily found in pharmacies around Malaysia. Over the years, we have expanded from just medical Examination Gloves and Disposable Face Mask to various types of disposable products such as Protective Apparels (Caps, Gown, Apron, Shoe Covers), Wound Care (Gauze, Bandages, Tapes, Dressing Set), Syringes & Needles, Sutures, Dental Products and more. UNIGLOVES is a worldwide brand that can also be found in Europe, UK, USA, Japan and China.

We believe in SAFETY THROUGH QUALITY. The principle goal of the company is to incorporate quality into all our activities in order to be more efficient in controlling the basic manufacturing elements relating to product quality. In addition, it is also our main policy to strive for continuous quality improvement to achieve this objective, we focus more on our customers’ needs and expectation, to gain their complete confidence with honesty and sincerity. We assure our customer of our commitment, reliability, consistency and efficiency
