description:
Eurasia Intercontinental Trading was registered in Singapore 2016, as a private limited company. We established ourselves to help bridge the gap between Ukrainian producers, providing high-quality goods at economic prices, and overseas buyers. We do this by providing additional safeguards and incorporating international banking practices with our Singapore regulated firm and offices in Ukraine to provide ease of access to the often difficult to penetrate producers in Ukraine & the Black Sea region.

As an experienced full service, international commodities trading firm, we have established partnerships with government organisations, business owners and producers in Ukraine that have been determined to exceed the requirements of overseas markets for quality and health standards. We have several years of experience dealing in this field and have expanded to launch our own production facility for sunflower oil, trademarks, and providing our services as international export managers for multiple producers in Ukraine.

description:
The United Agencies group is one of the largest carpet companies in Singapore, with a dedicated staff of 50 people providing world-class service to more than 500 clients throughout Asia and the Asia - Pacific region. 

We specialize in importing, exporting, stocking and installing all types of soft floor coverings from all over the world. We carry the most trusted brands in wall-to-wall carpets, area rugs, floor mats, carpet tiles and accessories to project that fresh and confident look which customers appreciate. We source our products on an exclusive basis from some of the largest and most reputable carpet manufactures in the world.

Our Catalogues and Architect Folders are made in-house and done most professionally with in-depth information, thus making it easy & convenient for clients to make their choice. Our website, with detailed information on our product ranges, also provides instant information to our clients anywhere and anytime. 

We also carry a wide range of stocks in PVC plastic sheetings & leather cloth which are ideal for industrial applications like the manufacture of stationery, files, books, handbags, wallets, upholstery as well as for the shipping industry These products are made from the most advanced synthetic materials to provide durability and strength.

We carry a wide variety and substantial stocks of soft floor coverings and carpet accessories in Singapore, which we are able to supply promptly to customers who require carpets urgently within a short time. 

Due to our long experience in the carpet field, we are also able to source suitable carpets for clients from all over the world on an indenting basis, with reasonable delivery times.

We are one of the largest carpet-focused companies in the Far East and we are the only interior furnishing stockists in Singapore who focus exclusively on floor coverings and accessories.

description:
Bluefox International is a Singapore based company that specialize in import & export of agriculture products between Singapore, China, Europe, Africa and South East Asia. From it humble beginning to today, Bluefox gradually grows itself and becomes a reputable global importer and food specialist for bringing high quality, tasty products at the lowest rate.

In order to create more value for our clients, we have developed long term partnership with several suppliers undertake non frill supply management to achieve the lowest prices which the benefits will finally delivered to our partners. We also established branch in China for implementing direct supply chain and product control to be cost competitive .

Our buyers trust us because our strengths lies on having reliable resources of food supply and networks that spreads over from South East Asia to Europe. We seek the best quality food base on the place that has the most distinctive natural advantages to produce them, and import them under strict safety standards governed by the law.

Our suppliers trust us because we have deeply established networks which can effectively distribute their products and providing prompt customer feedback. We position ourselves as a importer but also a strategic developer by providing a package of services on marketing, research, sales and after sales, distribution, public relation and media execution for anyone who wants to grow its business in Singapore.

description:
Tradeasia International Pte. Ltd is a privately owned, independent company headquartered in Singapore. Tradeasia International was first established in 2004 with the sole intention of carrying out chemical distribution services especially to commodity industries in many parts of the world. Tradeasia International provides excellent connectivity with the emerging markets and firmly believe in timely and perfectly managed procurement services. Tradeasia International offers supply chain management service, inbound/outbound logistics and chemical products consulting. At Tradeasia International, the services are always client based and tailored to the needs and desires of each customer.

Tradeasia International now operates in 12 regional offices and represents a growing number of businesses that are serving a variety of markets. Tradeasia International sources and supplies about 500-600 containers monthly to its customers worldwide.

description:
Our way of living has evolved from what it used to be generations ago. Today, there is a greater focus on fitness, mental wellness and healthy living as a way of life.

We at Teck Sang, a traditional Chinese food ingredients provider, have realised this change in lifestyle and preference in today’s consumers. This is why we are on a journey to evolve with today’s generation.

We want to provide a new take on traditional taste while maintaining our deep-seated and rich heritage. We want to be the cause of healthy living by providing access to various healthy and high-quality ingredients at your fingertips.

With our new mobile applications, you can order your favourite ingredients right in the comfort of your home or even visit our retail store for a drive-by collection.

You can be rest assured and trust that we are constantly looking at developing innovative products to maintain our partnerships with our customers, partners, distributors and all critical stakeholders, as this is how we continue to serve you.

Teck Sang

"A Fresh Take on Traditional Taste"

description:
Dragon Ex-Protection Singapore Pte Ltd is the international sales office of Dragon Industrial Group, a global leader in explosion protection and modular infrastructure solutions. Strategically based in Singapore, we specialize in the design, engineering, and supply of onshore and offshore modular solutions tailored for high-risk, mission-critical environments.

Our comprehensive product portfolio includes:

Blast-Resistant Modules (BRMs)
Modular E-Houses for power & control systems

Modular C-Houses for instrumentation & control
Shelter-in-Place (SIP) Units for personnel safety
Mobile Chemical Storage Modules
Offshore-Certified Modular Containers
Modular Laboratory Facilities
Turnkey Modular Infrastructure Solutions
Custom-Engineered Special Containers

As a holistic safety solutions provider, we also deliver cutting-edge systems for:

Critical Infrastructure Hardening & Protection
Blast Protection & Mitigation
Dust Explosion Protection
Spark Detection & Automatic Extinguishing
Tank Venting & Explosion Relief
Air Filtration & HVAC Blast Protection

At Dragon Ex-Protection, we are committed to delivering engineering excellence, regulatory compliance, and operational resilience—empowering industries to operate safely in volatile, hazardous, and offshore environments.

Backed by decades of R&D, international certifications, and global project experience, we are your trusted partner in modular safety and explosion protection.

description:

description:
Welcome to Genstar International Pte Ltd, your trusted partner in the dynamic world of global trade. Since our incorporation on 14th May 2002, we have been at the forefront of facilitating seamless import and export solutions for businesses worldwide.

At Genstar International, we understand that the success of international trade hinges on reliability, efficiency, and precision. With years of experience in the industry, we have honed our expertise to deliver tailored and comprehensive services that cater to the unique needs of our clients.

Our commitment to excellence is evident in every aspect of our operations. From navigating complex customs regulations to optimizing supply chain logistics, we go the extra mile to ensure your goods reach their destination promptly and securely.

With a wide network of trusted partners and suppliers across the globe, we have established strong relationships that open up a world of possibilities for our clients. Whether you are seeking to expand your market reach or source quality products, Genstar International is here to turn your international trade aspirations into reality.

As a forward-thinking export and import company, we embrace technological advancements and innovative practices to stay ahead in an ever-changing landscape. Our team of dedicated professionals works tirelessly to provide you with the most up-to-date solutions and market insights, empowering your business to thrive in today's competitive environment.

When you choose Genstar International, you are choosing a reliable ally, a bridge between continents, and a conduit for seamless global trade. Join us on this journey of growth and success as we transform challenges into opportunities and aspirations into achievements.

Thank you for entrusting Genstar International Pte Ltd with your import and export needs. Let us build a prosperous future together.

For any product enquiry , please share your enquiry to Export@genstar.com.sg

description:

Today, almost four decades later, we offer services to a global operation for later project engineering, process plant spare parts, machinery and equipment supplies, with a total of staff strength of over 100 located in Singapore and internationally.

Our head office is situated in Singapore at the Senoko Industrial Estate which consists of modern office space, warehouse, and servicing facilities and operates as our global business centre coordinating with our offices in the Asia Pacific, Middle East and Europe.

Our dedicated staff understand the importance of meeting our Clients’ stringent requirements in terms if delivery schedules, quality and cost. We are quick to identify problems and are able to respond to our Clients’ needs with flexibility, professionalism and resourcefulness.

description:
The Fruit Guys is a wholesale trader of processed fruits and agricultural materials serving the global F&B industry. 

With operational bases in Vietnam and a main office in Singapore, we specialize in exporting tropical fruits — particularly frozen Passion Fruit and Mango — from Vietnam to markets around the world.

We connect the entire value chain, from gardens and small or medium-sized workshops to large IQF factories, helping them reach global importers. Acting as a packer, importer, and distributor of fresh and frozen tropical fruits, we ensure every product meets the highest standards of quality control and sustainable sourcing.

Our mission is simple: to help our partners find exactly what they’re looking for through a smooth, hassle-free transaction process.

Main Products: Passion Fruit, Dragon Fruit
Specialties: Fresh, Concentrate, and Frozen Fruits (including IQF & HPP lines)
Industry: Food & Beverage Services

description:
Founded by Eric Ng in 1979, ‘Decorial Pte Ltd’ is a fabricator and rain & shine solution provider with more than 30 years’ experience to date. As a pioneer in the sun shading industry we have migrated European technology and concept of sun shading, which started as early as the 1870s, into Singapore.

‘Decorial’ has been consistently promoting innovative shading technology effectively serve the functional purpose and at the same time, enhancing the aesthetic value of the existing building facade.The range of quality products that we provide are fully imported from world leading manufacturers which ensures their products undergoes intricate tests to meet strict international standards, while executing optimum quality control.

Today, ‘Decorial’ acts as Specialist Contractor or usually Nominated Sub-Contractor (NSC) to deal with Architects, Main Contractors, and Developers / Builders in the construction of rain & shine solutions through providing system and material specifications for proposed and on-going projects.

In addition, we have as the major player set the benchmark for high quality and standard in our local industry. To date, the company has completed more than 100,000 units of various shading systems, utilizing millions metre-squared(m2) of fabrics.

For more information, please feel free to visit Decorial Original Website. Call us at call us or email us to enquire now!

We are also an emerging toys distributor in Singapore, distributing solar and eco-friendly educational toys in the region. We have acquired exclusive/sole distribution rights for leading toy brands such as Robotime, Artec and Lordwell etc.

Eco Empower have established an extensive network of customer contacts in Asia since 2001. Our valued clients and partners come from all major industries and they are often leaders in their respective markets.

Our mission is to raise awareness and understanding of ecological responsibility and cultivate acceptance of eco-friendly products and services.

description:
MOVA GLOBAL is a multinational, recognized as one of the World leaders in food and beverage trading. Headquartered in Singapore, the company is present in the Asian, American, European, Australian and African markets.

Our values still correspond to the genesis of our creation, in the beginning as a small part-time project, but today attentive to the evolution of humanity, with social and environmental concerns, adding special attention to innovation, quality and food safety, adopting the best practices , always with the same mission.

We guarantee exclusive quotas for each product, in different geographies, large quantities that are shipped in appropriate containers or bulk, by sea. Adapting to the new global reality, we ship any fresh gourmet food by air, in less than 24 hours, to all countries.

MOVA GLOBAL has a diversified portfolio of products, namely grains such as SOYBEAN, SUGAR, COFFEE, CORN, including Portuguese, European and Latin American WINES, and also animal protein such as CHICKEN, PORK, BEEF, which we ship fresh or frozen, sold based on the main origins, always promoting the sustainability of the entire commercial network.

description:

description:
All Marketing Pte Ltd is an import, export trading and manufacturing company located in Singapore. Set up on 12 March 1980, it has provided engineering materials, supplies and fabrication services for multinational corporations and local companies from various industries. Over the years, the company has expanded its product range and services to meet the demand of the market.

Its main product range includes Paper and Cloth Phenolic Resin Laminated Sheets and Rods, Glass Epoxy Laminated sheets and rods, Composite Solder Pallet Materials (for SMT and Re-Flow pallets), Glastherm Thermal Insulating Materials (for plastic injection, die cast and rubber moulding machine), POM (Delrin), Cast Nylon and other standard and high performance plastic, composite and laminate materials used for application with demanding requirement on material strength and temperature resistance. It also provides supplies such as Hand Press, Industrial Grade Spray Paint, Cutting and Tapping Fluid to support operations for engineering companies.

With the latest computerised machinery, equipment and full support from its manufacturers in USA, UK, Italy, Germany, Japan, India and Taiwan, competitive pricing and good quality are assured.
